press_review.title: With Giannis in crowd, Olympiakos wins EuroLeague
press_review.text: In a raucous Telekom Center in Athens, Greece, on Sunday, Olympiakos clinched the EuroLeague basketball title, defeating Real Madrid 92-85 in a back-and-forth game that saw the eventual champions fall behind 15-3 in the opening four minutes.
